title: AreYouWinningSon
description: add trailer like winning animation on villager.
body:
# AreYouWinningSon

need [BagusLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bagus-lib)!
 

## Summary

this mod add Mojang's Village And Pillage trailer like winning raid animation on villager.
That's it

here is what looks like
![VillagerWinningAnimation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rJeL5RWu/images/2568b92b41fa1cadc796059eb50b61f54aa5ec06.gif)

## Planned Feature
pillager winning animation
